problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: If Acoustic levitation for contactless manipulation is applied to prevented, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
